positive: Minimalist illustration of a whimsical cosmic forest scene. Highly stylized, vector art aesthetic with bold lines and flat color fields, reminiscent of contemporary textile design. Central composition featuring glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna silhouetted against a deep indigo and midnight blue sky. The trees should have simplified, geometric shapes with glowing accents in neon cyan and vibrant magenta. Stars are depicted as perfect geometric constellations. The overall mood is magical, peaceful, and high-contrast. Use strong, crisp outlines suitable for screen printing. Clean silhouette, perfect symmetry, high detail, high contrast, perfect composition, vibrant color palette, suitable for a hoodie print.
